Title: Create a new user account
Test Data:
- Id: 1
- Password: password123
- Email: test@example.com
- Nome: John
- Cognome: Doe
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Utente() to create a new user.
2. Set the Id to 1 using setId(1).
3. Set the Password to "password123" using setPassword("password123").
4. Set the Email to "test@example.com" using setEmail("test@example.com").
5. Set the Nome to "John" using setNome("John").
6. Set the Cognome to "Doe" using setCognome("Doe").
Expected Result: A new user object with the specified attributes should be created.

Title: Get user details
Preconditions: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
Test Steps:
1. Call getId() on the user object.
2. Call getPassword() on the user object.
3. Call getEmail() on the user object.
4. Call getNome() on the user object.
5. Call getCognome() on the user object.
Expected Result: The method calls should return the correct values set in TC-Utente-001.

Title: Update user details
Preconditions: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
Test Data:
- New Nome: Jane
- New Cognome: Smith
Test Steps:
1. Call setNome("Jane") on the user object.
2. Call setCognome("Smith") on the user object.
Expected Result: The user's Nome and Cognome should be updated to "Jane" and "Smith" respectively.

Title: Create a new product
Test Data:
- Nome: Lampada
- Luogo: Roma
- Descrizione: Lampada da tavolo
- Immagine: lampada.jpg
- Prezzo: 50.0
- Proprietario: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Prodotto() to create a new product.
2. Set the Nome to "Lampada" using setNome("Lampada").
3. Set the Luogo to "Roma" using setLuogo("Roma").
4. Set the Descrizione to "Lampada da tavolo" using setDescrizione("Lampada da tavolo").
5. Set the Immagine to "lampada.jpg" using setImmagine("lampada.jpg").
6. Set the Prezzo to 50.0 using setPrezzo(50.0).
7. Set the Proprietario to the user object using setProprietario(user).
Expected Result: A new product object with the specified attributes should be created.

Title: Get product details
Preconditions: Product object created as in TC-Prodotto-001
Test Steps:
1. Call getNome() on the product object.
2. Call getLuogo() on the product object.
3. Call getDescrizione() on the product object.
4. Call getImmagine() on the product object.
5. Call getPrezzo() on the product object.
6. Call getProprietario() on the product object.
Expected Result: The method calls should return the correct values set in TC-Prodotto-001.

Title: Update product details
Preconditions: Product object created as in TC-Prodotto-001
Test Data:
- New Nome: Lampada da parete
- New Luogo: Milano
- New Descrizione: Lampada da parete moderna
- New Immagine: lampada_parete.jpg
- New Prezzo: 70.0
Test Steps:
1. Call setNome("Lampada da parete") on the product object.
2. Call setLuogo("Milano") on the product object.
3. Call setDescrizione("Lampada da parete moderna") on the product object.
4. Call setImmagine("lampada_parete.jpg") on the product object.
5. Call setPrezzo(70.0) on the product object.
Expected Result: The product's Nome, Luogo, Descrizione, Immagine, and Prezzo should be updated to the new values.

Title: Create a new report
Test Data:
- Tipo: True
- Id: 1
- Titolo: Problema con prodotto
- Descrizione: Il prodotto non funziona correttamente
- UtenteSegnalato: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
- Autore: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Segnalazione() to create a new report.
2. Set the Tipo to True using setTipo(True).
3. Set the Id to 1 using setId(1).
4. Set the Titolo to "Problema con prodotto" using setTitolo("Problema con prodotto").
5. Set the Descrizione to "Il prodotto non funziona correttamente" using setDescrizione("Il prodotto non funziona correttamente").
6. Set the UtenteSegnalato to the user object using setUtenteSegnalato(user).
7. Set the Autore to the user object using setAutore(user).
Expected Result: A new report object with the specified attributes should be created.

Title: Get report details
Preconditions: Report object created as in TC-Segnalazione-001
Test Steps:
1. Call getTipo() on the report object.
2. Call getId() on the report object.
3. Call getTitolo() on the report object.
4. Call getDescrizione() on the report object.
5. Call getUtenteSegnalato() on the report object.
6. Call getAutore() on the report object.
Expected Result: The method calls should return the correct values set in TC-Segnalazione-001.

Title: Update report details
Preconditions: Report object created as in TC-Segnalazione-001
Test Data:
- New Tipo: False
- New Id: 2
- New Titolo: Problema con prodotto nuovo
- New Descrizione: Il prodotto nuovo non funziona correttamente
- New UtenteSegnalato: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
- New Autore: User object created as in TC-Utente-001
Test Steps:
1. Call setTipo(False) on the report object.
2. Call setId(2) on the report object.
3. Call setTitolo("Problema con prodotto nuovo") on the report object.
4. Call setDescrizione("Il prodotto nuovo non funziona correttamente") on the report object.
5. Call setUtenteSegnalato(user) on the report object.
6. Call setAutore(user) on the report object.
Expected Result: The report's Tipo, Id, Titolo, Descrizione, UtenteSegnalato, and Autore should be updated to the new values.

Title: Associate a user with a product
Preconditions: User and product objects created as in TC-Utente-001 and TC-Prodotto-001
Test Steps: 1. Call setProprietario(user) on the product object.
Expected Result: The product's Proprietario attribute should be set to the user object.

Title: Associate a user with a report
Preconditions: User and report objects created as in TC-Utente-001 and TC-Segnalazione-001
Test Steps:
1. Call setAutore(user) on the report object.
2. Call setUtenteSegnalato(user) on the report object.
Expected Result: The report's Autore and UtenteSegnalato attributes should be set to the user object.
